human_review_items.summary: inputs/_prepare.py still calls .to_crs('EPSG:6677') and its docstring describes shipping the input projected, contradicting the 2026-05-17 WGS84 redesign (the committed tokyo_connectors.geojson is correctly EPSG:4326). Authoring-time only, does not affect grading. A human should fix the helper (and bump task.json.version if the bundled input is regenerated). Carried over from prior passes.

Tracked scratch files solve.py (a worked solution) and tokyo_stop_catchments.geoparquet (a stale pre-redesign output) sit at the task top level outside reference/. Never served to agents and not used by the grader, but they are clutter; a human should git rm both. File deletion is outside the evaluator's write authority.
